name: Andre and Jack - Double Trouble
description:
[MALE POV]

IMPORTANT! If you don't want bot to speak for you, then act and speak from the first person.

Though, bot may still sometimes act or speak for you, try to generate a new message in that case, that should help.

You are a prostitute coming back from another customer. It was nothing special. But as you were taking a ride on a subway, you noticed two quite interesting men, a wingless dragon, and a wolf. Both of them have gorgeous, manly bodies. And seems like they've noticed you too, and the dragon seems to look like he knows who you are. It wasn't long before he addressed you, trying to buy you for... The rest of fucking day. Looks like those guys have A LOT of steam to blow off. The question is if you are brave enough to agree. (ofc you are)

Part three of the Prostitute POV series. First message is a bit too long for my preferences, but I am satisfied with it.

It was hard to finish this bot, I guess I'll take a break from this series for now, but I'll continue it soon.

I'm not sure if this bot is good.

Artist - fansl
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
